Notice And Motion For An Order Compelling Further Responses By Deft Sean A. Pintchovski To Pltf'S Form Interrogatories, Set One Nos. 2.6 And 2.7 Request For Costs Sanctions And Attys Fees
Off Calendar Sep-01-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF CHRISTOPHER ROPERS MOTION FOR AN ORDER COMPELLING FURTHER RESPONSES BY DEFENDANT SEAN A. PINTCHOVSKI TO PLAINTIFF'S FORM INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE, NOS. 2.6 AND 2.7, REQUEST FOR COSTS, SANCTIONS, AND ATTORNEYS FEES AGAINST DEFENDANT SEAN A. PINTCHOVSKI AND/OR HIS ATTORNEY OF RECORD CESARI, WERNER AND MORIARTY.

APPEARANCES: William M. McPhillips, Esq. of Law Offices of Richard M. Lester 818/906-1111 for pltf & moving party (appearing via CourtCall); Stephen L. Dahm, Esq. of Law Offices of Cesari Werner and Moriarty 391-1113 for deft & opposing party.

RULING: Court denied defendant's request for continuance and adopted its tentative ruling - GRANTED, NO OPPOSITION FILED. Amount of sanctions argued and the Court awarded $1,000.00 (4 hours at $250/hour) in sanctions plus $40.00 filing fee against defendant and his counsel payable within 15 days after service of order. Plaintiff to prepare a proposed form of order. Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Not reported

Notice And Motion To Compel Further Responses By Deft To Pltf'S Form Interrogatories, Set One, And Request For Costs, Sanctions And Attys Fees
Off Calendar Aug-11-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Penny L. Wheat, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: CHRISTOPHER ROPER
Stephen L. Dahm, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: Sean Pintchovski

After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF CHRISTOPHER ROPER's Motion For Order Compelling Further Responses By Defendant To Plaintiff's Form Interrogatories, Set One, is granted. Defendant is ordered to respond within 10 days of notice of this order. The responses were a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $750, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Late opposition has been considered. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.
